title: Lesson 68: This and that and How Many
concepts: We've already used 'this' and 'that' in a number of ways. Time to take a closer look into their varied uses throughout the language.

sentences.spanish: Nada me gusta más que esto
sentences.english: I don't like anything more than this

sentences.spanish: Nada me gustó más que eso
sentences.english: Nothing please me more than that

sentences.spanish: Estábamos tan cansada que dormimos todo el día
sentences.english: We were so tired that we slept all day

sentences.spanish: Estábamos tan cansada cuando llegamos que dormimos todo el día
sentences.english: We were so tired when we arrived that we slept all day

sentences.spanish: No sé cuantas veces lo visité
sentences.english: I don't know how many times I visited him

sentences.spanish: No sé cuantas veces lo visitaron
sentences.english: I don't know how many times I visited him

sentences.spanish: No sé cuantas veces la visitaron
sentences.english: I don't know how many times I visited her
